overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long AAOI Daily ETF (AAOG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (Nasdaq: AAOI) stock, less fees, and expenses AAOG was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
